description_long: This stadium features an octagonal structure with tiered seating arranged around a central rectangular field or stage. The exterior is defined by a combination of blue and gray panels, with prominent blue framing along the upper edges and corners. Multiple rows of seats are visible, separated by aisles, and the seating is elevated above the ground level, suggesting a sunken central area. Large lighting rigs or display boards are mounted above several sections of the seating, providing illumination or information to spectators. The facade is composed of smooth, modular panels, and the overall design is compact and modern, suitable for urban environments. The stadium appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, metal, and plastic, with open air spaces above the seating.
description: A compact, octagonal stadium with tiered blue and gray seating, modular panel facade, and prominent lighting rigs above the stands. The design is modern and urban, with a sunken central area and smooth exterior surfaces.
description_view_0: The stadium is seen from a side angle, highlighting the blue framing, tiered seating, and three large lighting rigs above the stands.
description_view_1: This view shows the stadium from a corner, revealing the depth of the seating rows and a single central lighting rig above the main entrance area.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side angle emphasizes the symmetry of the octagonal structure and the arrangement of lighting fixtures.
description_view_3: This corner view mirrors view 1, with a clear look at the seating depth and the central lighting rig above the entrance.
attribute_facade_design: The facade is composed of smooth, modular gray panels with bold blue framing along the upper edges and corners. The structure is octagonal, with clean lines and a uniform, modern appearance. The upper perimeter features prominent lighting rigs or display boards, adding a functional and high-tech visual element. The exterior surfaces are largely unadorned, emphasizing geometric simplicity and structural clarity.
attribute_entrance_type: The primary entrances appear as wide, open gateways at ground level, integrated into the modular panel facade. These entrances are large enough to accommodate crowds and are likely equipped with security barriers or turnstiles, though these are not explicitly visible.
attribute_lighting_fixtures: Large floodlight rigs mounted above the seating areas on several sides, each consisting of multiple lights arranged in horizontal arrays.
